ogTitle: Leafdale vs Lefthand Branch: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Leafdale and Lefthand Branch.
heading: Leafdale vs Lefthand Branch — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Leafdale, Queensland and Lefthand Branch, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Leafdale has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Lefthand Branch (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Leafdale or Lefthand Branch safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Leafdale has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Lefthand Branch scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Leafdale scores 28/100 for bushfire risk. Lefthand Branch scores 29/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Leafdale or Lefthand Branch?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Leafdale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
